case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. JESSICA MOZELCO et al

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-04-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-26-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
